purpose: Curated real NTL-Claw GEE Python server-side cases. Use as implementation patterns, not as fixed scripts.

cases.use_when: Country-scale or all-province annual NTL mean/ranking tasks, especially China 34 province-level units.
avoid: local zonal statistics as primary path

cases.use_when: User uploaded a small boundary shapefile and wants zonal NTL stats without downloading the raster.
avoid: large local raster download when table output is enough

cases.use_when: Annual NTL time series and trend extraction for one city/province/country geometry.
avoid: downloading one raster per year for simple regional means

cases.use_when: Daily VNP46A2 event-impact analysis over epicenter buffers and pre/post windows.
